To deploy Python changes: docker cp file container:/app/ → docker compose restart backend
All LangGraph nodes are pure functions (state) → state · DB Connector: read-only HITL SQL executor · ServiceNow KB: draft article publisher · DBA Copilot: floating SSE chat
